Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Mettu mettu ekkuthara
Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

snippet.title: فايز الدوسري - أسمع كلامي (حصرياً) | 2026
snippet.description:
:لمتابعة الفنان فايز الدوسري عبرالصفحات الإجتماعية والموسيقية 
https://alfan.link/fayezaldosri


إشترك وفّعل التنبيهات في قناة فايز الدوسري الرسمية للحصول على أحدث إصداراته الفنية
https://bit.ly/2OavIu6


فايز الدوسري - أسمع كلامي (حصرياً) | 2026
Fayez Aldosri - I Hear My Words (EXCLUSIVE) | 2026 


كلمات : تركي الميزاني
اداء : فايز الدوسري
مكس وتوزيع : أيمن مخاوي
جرافيك : ناصر البقمي


---------


- كلمات -

‎ياحرفي اللي ضاع مابين الدفاتر والرفوف
اللي رسمته من تنهَّاتي ومن حبر قلمي

ضحيت لجله في حروف وقمت لجله في حروف
وصبرت لو النار من فوقي ومن تحت قدمي

ياصاحبي اللي على شانك تحديت الضروف
اسمع كلامي زين وافهم وش اقوله من فمي

ماهو بأنا اللي تتركه بين الخناجر والسيوف
وتمص دمه بين خلق الله يامصاص الدمي

انا بدويٍ ماسكن في الوقت مسكان الضعوف
اتبع هوا بالي واسير عند ذودي وغنمي

طوفتها لك لجل خاطر عين ولا ماتطوف
ولا انت مهما زاد وزنك وزني يطرحك نسمي

صمتي يدل اني وفي ومسويٍ فيك امعروف
وصبري يدل اني من زحول الصناديد انتمي

ياقوم ياللي تذبحون الحيل قدرٍ للضيوف
وش رايكم في اللي يعشيني من اوصال لحمي

وقفت له يوم اجلسوا واجلستله ناسٍ وقوف
غير الذخيره والفشق في محزمه من محزمي

‎ياحرفي اللي ضاع مابين الدفاتر والرفوف
اللي رسمته من تنهَّاتي ومن حبر قلمي

ضحيت لجله في حروف وقمت لجله في حروف
وصبرت لو النار من فوقي ومن تحت قدمي

ياصاحبي اللي على شانك تحديت الضروف
اسمع كلامي زين وافهم وش اقوله من فمي

ماهو بأنا اللي تتركه بين الخناجر والسيوف
وتمص دمه بين خلق الله يامصاص الدمي

انا بدويٍ ماسكن في الوقت مسكان الضعوف
اتبع هوا بالي واسير عند ذودي وغنمي

طوفتها لك لجل خاطر عين ولا ماتطوف
ولا انت مهما زاد وزنك وزني يطرحك نسمي

صمتي يدل اني وفي ومسويٍ فيك امعروف
وصبري يدل اني من زحول الصناديد انتمي

ياقوم ياللي تذبحون الحيل قدرٍ للضيوف
وش رايكم في اللي يعشيني من اوصال لحمي

وقفت له يوم اجلسوا واجلستله ناسٍ وقوف
غير الذخيره والفشق في محزمه من محزمي

Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Apekz - Tuldok
snippet.description:
Produced by @thisisneroph 

Intro 

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

Inakyat ko mataas na bundok
Di tumigil kahit mga paa ko mabugbog
kung kelan nakatungtong sa tuktok
Saka naman nagkaroon ng tuldok x2


Verse

Maraming nagaabang maraming nagtatanong
Kelan battle miss ka na namin mang baon
Bago ko sagutin kung bakit ba ganon
Ibalik muna natin sa dating panahon

Estranghero at Ramon, Yawzi at Pajutes
Datu vs Loonie eto snappy na salute
Hanggang sa maligaw kay eminem pati kay juice
Binge watch ng grind time pagka galing ko ng school

Rekta na kagad sa computer shop
Panahong di pa uso yung google maps 
Sina soundtrip yung freestyle ni supernat
Ako’y nahuli ng rap parang na-booby trap

Hanggang sa mapanuod yung cameltoe versus datu
Brand new ginanap sa quantum
Acapella parang dumbfoundead vs tantrum
Tagalog pa kaya yung dating ay naging times two

Tiningnan ko kung facebook sila
Gusto ko na malaman kung meant to be ba
Di lang na simple na asaran parang beh bote nga
Inisip lang yung legacy may a to z pa

2010 kalaban ko si harlem ty
 B A T T L E R A P
Komedyante na rapper parang michael v.
Nagapi nung unang salang pero ays lang gee

Ako ay og parang obe wan kenobi
Unang tf ko nun kay daddy joe d.
Five hundred pesos yung inabot kay toti
Pasimple lowkey palihim parang shinobi

Unang laban ko disisyete anyos
Nung natalo winning streak na pagkatapos
Pano pa pag yung degree ay nairaos
Rap ang pinili pinagisipan ng maayos

Pagbaba ng barko walang ng doubt
Nilaban ko kagad si bryan lao
Imbis na mag tiktik kalawang mamili ng weak na kalaban
Ang gusto ko peak na agad bakbakan sa south

Nababad ng husto lalong pinahusay
Isang dos por dos tatlong isabuhay
Naihanay ako sa mga tunay
Yung bata na nag solo flight dun sa malugay

Dumaan ang pandemya handa pa rin gumera
Kaso ba’t may hurado na nagpapalitan ng pera
Nag iba yung sistema walang tinatalo
Di na ata to yung liga na kilala ko

Fast forward twenty twenty two
Laban ko kay Sinio ready execute
Yung lugar sobrang grimey pwede mv shoot
Binuhos ko walang natira miski na residue

Dahil sa pustahan yung career ang tinaya ko
Ayoko lang yung sining natin parang ginagago
Galit yung ibang tao  
Pero may resibo, meron video garapalan na hindi na tinatago

“Yari ka pati yung presidente binangga mo”
Alam kong pwedeng kahinatnan ng ginawa ko
Buti kahit papano meron pinagbago
At di totoo na matagal ko na yun pinaplano

“Kung meron kang problema dapat kinausap mo”
Malapit na yung battle nung nadagdag yun sa sulat ko
Ipapaalam ko pa ba yun kay Anygma
Battle emcee din sya ulo pa ng liga

Yung pagkatalo raw kay gorio ay dinadamdam
di nakuha kampeonato na inaasam
liga ay sinasaktan tanginang pustahan yan
dahil sa utang na loob hinahayaan lang 

Yung pusta isang milyon alam kong talo na’ko
Dagdag mo pa gawain nung mga hurado
Tensionado, emosyon, pressure halo-halo
Kaya sa entablado nagmukha akong barumbado

Lumipas ang tatlong taon
Siguro nawala yung mga tampo ngayon
Fliptop anniversary nag ayang pumunta don
Para magpakumbaba at masabi ko yung rason

Walang driver si loons kaya di nakasabay
Sumama ako kay zaki sa grab ay sumakay
Kahit di imbitado pumunta pasaway
Para personal mag sorry at makipagkamay

Bumili ng sariling alak at ng mangunguya
Para di masabi na ang kapal naman ng mukha
Nandun din lahat ng pasimple na nangungutya
Pero balewala gold label yung tinutungga

Hinintay ko siya baka lang natraffic
Pati si loons wala pa ba yan naman awit
Tinawag ng bantay si anygma daw nagalit
At ang sabi sakin pinapaalis ka ni aric

Ang sabi ko ganon ba di nako nagtanong pa
Sana lang hinarap nya ko gusto ko mangamusta
Kahit di na bigyan ng laban ay wala kong pake
Basta matapos yung gabi na maayos kami

Kaso eto na yung ending ni tanga 
Pero ang bait ni kuya dennis talaga
Ba’t kapa pumunta eh ekis ka na nga
Diyos nga nagpapatawad ay atheist ka pala

Tinanggap ko kahit na masakit
At least malinaw na di na ako makakabalik
Namiss ko yung yanig, pagod at stress
Lam kong maraming sabik kay battousaipekz

But i guess this is the end
Di na kailangan icallout sa big event
Hinihiling kasi pag bumanat hindi bitin
Pag FT alam mong hindi titipirin kalaban titirisin

Shoutout sa mga bago hindi pabulong
Mindanao, visayas pati sa luzon
Dire diretso lang wag magningas kugon
“Nauubos na yung magaling” mali ako don

Sa mga tagahanga na nanunuod sa akin
Hinugot nyo ako sa kumunoy na malalim
di ko man matupad na mga bulong sa hangin
Gusto kong malaman nyo kayo bumuo sa akin

Sa buhay natin kailangan ng sakripisyo
Upang marating ang sariling paraiso
Meron dahilan kung bakit natatalisod
May plano ang Diyos kung bakit ka nandirito

Pasensya na kahit hilutin ko kapos
Eto na yung huling minuto ko tapos
Salamat aric ang buti mo na boss
Salamat fliptop mi ultimo adios

Outro

My life ain't so bad  
You drive so fast  
To the silence, baby  
Don't trip, relax
And we'll be alright  
’Til the sunrise

#tuldok #apekz #apekztuldok

snippet.description:
Cigarettes After Sex — Apocalypse
Español / Lyrics ✨

╰► 𝗕𝗔𝗦𝗜𝗖 𝗜𝗡𝗙𝗢 ❥
Cigarettes After Sex - Apocalypse
Released 20/03/2017

🌅 Imagen de fondo: (aquí va la imagen, que no se te olvide)

💿 Sigue al artista: (Redes sociales aquí)

Canal Música Mexa: https://www.youtube.com/@RichieMexa

Lyrics de la canción :D
You leapt from crumbling bridges, watching cityscapes turn to dust
Filming helicopters crashing in the ocean from way above
Got the music in you, baby, tell me why
Got the music in you, baby, tell me why
You've been locked in here forever, and you just can't say goodbye
Kisses on the foreheads of the lovers wrapped in your arms
You've been hiding them in hollowed-out pianos left in the dark
Got the music in you, baby, tell me why
Got the music in you, baby, tell me why
You've been locked in here forever, and you just can't say goodbye
Your lips, my lips
Apocalypse
Your lips, my lips
Apocalypse
Go and sneak us through the rivers
Flood is rising up on your knees
Oh, please
Come out and haunt me, I know you want me
Come out and haunt me
Sharing all your secrets with each other, since you were kids
Sleeping soundly with the locket that she gave you clutched in your fist
Got the music in you, baby, tell me why
Got the music in you, baby, tell me why
You've been locked in here forever, and you just can't say goodbye
You've been locked in here forever, and you just can't say goodbye
Oh, when you're all alone
I will reach for you
When you're feeling low
I will be there too
____________________________________
